goal: Add a side-effect-free in-memory receipt authority artifact builder for cockpit patch audit receipt record audit receipt preflights without durable receipt writes, patch application, server/route mutation, permit consumption, or executable actions.
scope_out: Do not write receipts or audits, perform durable persistence, consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write runtime artifacts.
claims: Cockpit audit receipt record audit receipt preflight artifacts can be authorized in memory.
Authority id, authorized-by ref, and expiry ref are required.
Receipt writes, audit writes, durable persistence, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, permit consumption, and executable actions remain false.
assumptions: Durable receipt persistence and receipt creation require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing authority id, and blocked preflight cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, diff-check, and full builder tests pass.
stop_conditions: Receipt write, durable audit write, durable persistence, permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, executable action, external calls, DB, package, workflow, deployment, or runtime write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-207 preflighted cockpit audit receipt record audit receipts without authorizing or writing them.
